module_docs.runtime: Runtime builders, handles, scheduler state, and region lifecycle surfaces.
module_docs.cx: Capability context and structured concurrency scope APIs.
module_docs.channel: Cancel-correct channel primitives, including MPSC, oneshot, broadcast, and watch.
module_docs.sync: Cancel-aware mutex, rwlock, semaphore, pool, barrier, and once-cell primitives.
module_docs.lab: Deterministic lab runtime, virtual time, scenario runner, replay, and oracles.
module_docs.http: Native HTTP protocol and client/server surfaces.
module_docs.web: Router, extractors, handlers, and request-region web surfaces.
module_docs.service: Service and layer traits for middleware-style composition.
module_docs.raptorq: RaptorQ encoding, decoding, repair, and proof surfaces.
module_docs.atp: Native ATP object-transfer and dogfood workflow surfaces.
module_docs.spork: Supervised application topology and deterministic app harness surfaces.
module_docs.database: Optional SQLite, Postgres, and MySQL client and pool surfaces.

entry_points.summary: Build a runtime and enter an async main body.
Own spawned work under a structured scope.
Race futures with loser drain semantics.
Use two-phase MPSC send/receive paths in an end-to-end example.
Inject cancellation at deterministic await points.
Load and run YAML-backed deterministic lab scenarios.
Exercise HTTP client pooling and protocol behavior.
Build a minimal supervised application topology.
Run a deterministic RaptorQ transfer workflow.
Start from the native ATP daemon example.
Expose metrics with the Prometheus example surface.
